Title: iCloudPage  is not available
HTML: Page is not available Can't access this site The server at Page can't be found, because the DNS lookup failed. DNS is the network service that translates a website's name to its Internet address. This error is most often caused by having no connection to the Internet or a misconfigured network. It can also be caused by an unresponsive DNS server or a firewall preventing Google Chrome from accessing the network. Error code: DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN Unable to resolve the server's DNS address.

Title: Ledger.com/Start  | Getting Started — Ledger Support™
HTML: joelinv Home About Sign in Subscribe Ledger.com/Start  | Getting Started — Ledger Support™ hena 27 Jan 2026 — 3 min read In the ever-evolving world of cryptocurrencies, keeping your digital assets safe is more important than ever. Hacking incidents, phishing scams, and compromised software wallets are becoming all too common, especially for beginners navigating the space without proper tools or knowledge. This is where Ledger.com/start comes into play — a comprehensive official onboarding portal from Ledger, designed to securely guide users through every step of setting up their hardware wallet, installing software, and managing assets with confidence.🔍 What Is Ledger.com/start?Ledger.com/start is the official starting point for users of Ledger hardware wallets — the industry-leading devices for securing cryptocurrencies. Whether you've purchased a Ledger Nano S Plus, Ledger Nano X, or any other Ledger model, this page provides step-by-step instructions to:Set up your hardware wallet securelyDownload and install Ledger LiveGenerate and safeguard your recovery phraseInitialize your walletManage your crypto portfolio safelyIt's essentially the launchpad for your crypto journey — centralizing critical instructions and eliminating the confusion or risks associated with scattered, unofficial guides.💡 Key Advantages & Benefits of Using Ledger.com/startUsing Ledger.com/start (and following its official process) comes with several distinct advantages:🛡️ 1. Maximum Security from Scams and PhishingOne of the biggest threats in crypto is phishing — fake websites that mimic official pages to trick users into revealing their recovery phrase or private keys. Ledger.com/start is the verified official URL that ensures the setup steps you follow are trusted and uncompromised, shielding you from scams.📌 Important Security Rule: Ledger will never ask you for your recovery phrase online. Any request for your seed phrase outside of your device is a scam.🔐 2. True Self-Custody of Your CryptoUnlike custodial wallets (where a third party holds your keys for you), Ledger's model ensures you control your private keys. These keys are generated inside your Ledger device and never touch your computer or phone, meaning they stay protected even if your device is compromised.📲 3. Easy Setup — Even for BeginnersLedger.com/start breaks down a potentially intimidating process into clear, manageable steps:Verify your product and unbox your LedgerVisit Ledger.com/startInstall Ledger LiveInitialize your deviceWrite down and confirm your recovery phraseSet your PINAdd crypto accounts and start managing assetsThis guided experience removes guesswork and helps you avoid common errors — like miswriting your recovery phrase — that can lead to irreversible loss.💼
